desc: Removes the applied view template from a specified view (or the active view).
summary: Removes the applied view template from a specified view (or the active view). Uses SetTemplate to detach the template assignment. Called by Claude when the user wants to free a view from template control.
usecase: User wants to detach a view template so they can manually adjust visibility/graphics. User wants to remove a template before applying a different one.
notfor: Deleting view templates from the project (use Purge or delete directly). Applying a different template (use ApplyViewTemplateCommand instead).
precondition: Active document must be open. Target view must not itself be a template.
postcondition: The view's ViewTemplateId is set to InvalidElementId. The view reverts to manual graphic overrides.

config_inputs.name: viewId
config_inputs.description: Optional target view id (defaults to active view)

preprompts: Removing the view template from the target view...
